semantic.role: Validation script for ArchSpine protocol schema conformance
responsibilities: Loads JSON schemas from a schemas directory
Validates example JSON files against their corresponding schemas
Handles special case validation for Markdown rule documents with frontmatter
Reports validation results and exits with appropriate status code

English.purpose: This document is a Node.js validation script that ensures all example protocol assets in the ArchSpine system conform to their defined JSON schemas. It acts as a gatekeeper for protocol integrity, catching structural errors before they propagate.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and maintainers of the ArchSpine protocol who need to verify that example files (both JSON and Markdown with frontmatter) match the expected schema definitions. The script is run as part of CI or local development workflows.
key_takeaways: Automatically loads all .schema.json files from the schemas directory
Validates a predefined set of example files against their corresponding schemas
Handles Markdown rule documents by extracting frontmatter and body content
Exits with code 1 on any validation failure, making it suitable for CI pipelines

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是一个 Node.js 验证脚本，用于确保 ArchSpine 系统中所有示例协议资产符合其定义的 JSON 模式。它充当协议完整性的守门人，在结构错误传播之前将其捕获。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于 ArchSpine 协议的开发者和维护者，他们需要验证示例文件（包括 JSON 和带前置元数据的 Markdown）是否与预期的模式定义匹配。该脚本作为 CI 或本地开发工作流的一部分运行。
key_takeaways: 自动从 schemas 目录加载所有 .schema.json 文件
针对预定义的示例文件集合，验证其与对应模式的匹配性
通过提取前置元数据和正文内容来处理 Markdown 规则文档
任何验证失败时以退出码 1 终止，适合集成到 CI 流水线中
